member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.EF.CoreIdentityDbContext`3
member.summary: Generic IdentityDbContext base with shared configuration and entities.
member.typeparam: The type of the primary key (e.g., Guid, int).

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.EF.Repositories.EfRefreshTokenStore`1
member.summary: Provides Entity Framework-backed operations for storing, retrieving, and revoking refresh tokens.
member.typeparam: The type of the user's unique identifier.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.EF.Repositories.SqlServerRefreshTokenStore`1
member.summary: Provides SQL Server-backed operations for storing, retrieving, and revoking refresh tokens.
member.typeparam: The type of the user's unique identifier.
